title: Chapter 20
content:
Chapter 20

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x139]

[You have gained 13900 EXP]

[You have gained an E rank mana crystal x139]

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x64]

[You have gained 64000 EXP]

[You have gained a D rank mana crystal x64]

[You have leveled up x23]

[EXP 3814\4900]

[You have received 115 stat points]

[SC +77900]

[SC: 86,350]

I had been hunting for almost three hours now, and even with the coins inflow, the weapons I purchased were the same, and I had burned almost six swords. Even after killing so many of them and almost mapping out the entire sewers, there had been no sign of the giant boss rat. Either it was constantly moving, so I couldn't find it, or someone else was behind this.

Someone human.

I combed the entire sewers once again, but finding no living being in there, I returned outside and made my way home. I was hoping for some more, but I was unfortunate.

At level 50, I'd stop earning EXP and SCs from lower-level monsters such as F and E.

I was a couple of thousand away from turning 100,000 as well, where I could buy the skill I had my eyes on. I planned to return to the sewer someday again, but I had a feeling that whatever it was down there in the sewers wouldn't be there anymore.

With only a sigh, I cleaned myself using [Cleanse] and changed my clothes, which were no better than rags at the moment. Once I was done, I made my way home. It was already bright, so I had a hunch that no matter how free, everyone at the house would already be awake.

When I returned, I was proven right as I could see Rayla in the kitchen, properly dressed, and Julian cutting some vegetables. They saw me, and Rayla greeted me with a smile, "Are you making a habit out of running out in the morning?"

"Yes, I am." I simply replied before I moved behind her and began to fondle her giant ass. She didn't say anything and kept doing what she was doing. As for Julian, when he saw me fondling his wife, he curiously asked, "What does that do, son?"

"It makes me feel good," I replied before I raised Rayla's skirt and inserted my hand in her giant meat buns.

I traced her ass crack until I arrived at her tight rosebud but no matter how hungry I was, I knew it wasn't time to eat this one so I traveled further down until I arrived at her slit. Parting her with my finger I arrived at her pussy hole and without hesitation, I inserted one finger in.

"Ahhnn~~" Rayla gasped and moaned out loud, stopping whatever she was doing and putting her hands on the counter to brace herself.

"And mother finds it good as well," I added. Julian still couldn't understand what about this could be pleasurable, but I wasn't really keen on explaining to him. I was more focused on the wet and warm but tight feeling around my finger.

Her pussy sucked my finger in but also pulsated at the same time, as if trying to suffocate my finger. The grip was so tight I had never felt such a tight grip, even on girls who worked out like crazy.

I pulled a little before I inserted my finger back in, eliciting another moan from her. I kept fingering her for a few minutes without the added pleasure of mana.

"Nnnhh~~ mmhh~~ ohh~~ ooohhh~~~" Rayla moaned on instinct, and I kept feeling full of desire as I kept fingering her. Now that I had fingered her for quite some time, she was loosening up, but only from the inside. Maybe it was on reflex, but she had begun clenching my finger, making the pleasure twofold.

"Aahhh~~ Aahnhhhnh~~~ Haaannhhhh~~~" She finally squirted on my finger as her hands grabbed the counter so tightly I swear I could see cracks under her hands and that was some sort of stone, not wood.

"Haa... Haa..." She gasped for air as she tried to catch her breath, all the while her husband stood next to us as if he was watching most of the strangest things unfold. I let it go as it was and extracted my finger from her tightness, and the sensitivity made her hiss.

"Hnngg~~" It was more of a moan, but as I extracted my finger and licked my hand to taste her juices for the first time, I could have sworn I tasted watermelon. First strawberries on Martha, and now watermelon on Rayla. Something was strange.

"Ahh..." Rayla let out a strange sigh and looked at me with a smile, her giant covered chest still heaving as she said weakly, "Thank you for making me feel better the first thing in the morning, sweetie."

I nodded back with a smile and replied, "Anything for you, mother."

Anything at all.

I then left for my room to find Lucas sitting cross-legged, and I could sense him moving his mana throughout his body. I guess he was training, refining his mana. The technique was inefficient, to say the least.

He was using too much mana for refinement. Refinement wasn't done on mana itself, but the heart and the heart was the pump of the body. In other words, mana wasn't the thing being refined but the heart, and in doing so, the whole body.

Still, it was too early to give him advice. I focused on my own task for the time being. And that was to become a one-star master.

Well, in general, I called it one star, but it was called one star only in the case of aura. Circle for mana and the core solidification stage for Ki.

The maximum level one could attain was 500, and the stats were double that amount with the help of achievements and special titles. No stat could go beyond 1000, but enhancements such a buffs from items or skills could still be applied.

At level 50, it was one star. Then on and on with every level 50 being a wall until it was all the way up to 10 stars, making me as strong as a god, or at least the pinnacle of what the world allowed.

Anyway, the 50th level was also where I would receive my class, so I couldn't wait for that as well. But before that...

[Strength +25]

[Agility +25]

[Stamina +25]

Bringing all my physical stats to 50, I focused on the rest. My intelligence was already 75, so I added 25 points to that as well, bringing it all the way up to 100, leaving myself with on 17 stat points. I was tempted to do something about those, but it wasn't the time.

[All limits have been met]

[Necessary stats have been increased to 50]

[You are now eligible to receive a class]

[Error]

[The user's level does not meet the requirement]

[Class acquisition would be put on hold]

I stood up, my body overflowing with power and energy. I stretched my muscles, feeling the usual unfamiliarity once again as the state rose once again, but it felt good as well because I was slowly getting to the point where I wouldn't be pushed around.

Not by the lord of this city at the very least.

I didn't know what his level was since that wasn't mentioned in the basic information of the world, I estimated it wouldn't be more than three to four stars, and even that was a stretch. I'd worry about him once I meet him, but for now, it was better to prepare.

There was no need to go out of the limit this soon and reveal all the cards.

For now, I was more focused on curing my little brother. The ingredients needed for my cure were available in the shop except for one. If it were Ki, then I wouldn't require that item, but since it was mana, extra assurance was always good. Besides, to construct the circuits, I'd need the purest of mana I could get.

Only two places to get those.

The system, which I already had, but not applicable in this scenario.

And the other place was none other than a dragon. A dragon's heart, to be more accurate. I've eaten a few in my past lives, and they provide the purest of mana ever. If there were no dragons in this one, then it would be a bind, and I'd be stuck with this temporary measure until I prepared for the other solution.

But I had a feeling there'd be dragons here.

I had a strong feeling.

Still, that would be impossible for me as well, as dragons were the literal gods' equivalent, and even I had to be careful when fighting them.

I needed another method, and I had a very good idea where to get such a thing. It would be a bother, but it was better and much more applicable, not to mention risk-free, and could be obtained in the near future, not in a very, very far away future.

Once I was done stretching, I went downstairs to find Rayla still working while Julian was grabbing her ass, trying to feel something but from Rayla's reaction, or the lack of it, it was better to assume there was no pleasure involved.

I shook my head and saw another source of pleasure for myself. A tiny, petite bomb sitting by herself in the living slash dining room.

~~
